cases.name: filter edges by type() string comparison
count edges of a specific kind
count typed edges reaching a node matching an inline property map
filter edges by a numeric property value
filter edges by a boolean property
one-hop traversal filtering where source and target are not the same node
cases.cypher: match (n1)-[]->(n2) where n1 <> n2 return n2

cases.name: traverse between typed endpoints with edge kind alternatives
traverse between multi-kind endpoints using edge kind alternatives
filter edges with reversed type() equality (literal on left)
traverse incoming edges filtering by kind alternatives
shared-node forward chain with two outgoing edges
two-hop chain filtering where the two traversed edges are not equal
cases.cypher: match ()-[r]->()-[e]->(n) where r <> e return n

cases.name: cross-product of an unrelated node and an edge
cross-product of two independent edge traversals
return id labels and type from an edge traversal with a numeric id filter
cases.cypher: match (s)-[r:EdgeKind1]->(e) where not (s.system_tags contains 'admin_tier_0') and id(e) = 1 return id(s), labels(s), id(r), type(r)
